Booking Requests

} @if (selectedBookingId() === req.id) {
Booking Details & Requirements
Chat Call
Location: Venue TBA
Time: 6:00 PM - 11:00 PM
Guests: Approx. 150
Contact: {{ req.customerName }}
Vendor Instructions: Please ensure that the services match the premium package quality standard. Customer expects setup to be complete 2 hours before the event.
